ogTitle: Wandana Heights vs Wandiligong: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Wandana Heights and Wandiligong.
heading: Wandana Heights vs Wandiligong — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Wandana Heights, Victoria and Wandiligong, Victoria. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Wandana Heights has a lower overall climate risk score (34/100) compared to Wandiligong (39/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Wandana Heights or Wandiligong safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Wandana Heights has a flood risk score of 26/100, while Wandiligong scores 29/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Wandana Heights scores 38/100 for bushfire risk. Wandiligong scores 50/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Wandana Heights or Wandiligong?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Wandana Heights has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.35% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
